feedback.text: I want the European Commission. I would like to bring my voice together with the thousands of people who are making themselves heard about our concerns about the future of the video games industry. Today, the game format as a service is on the agenda and this carries the risk that in the future, when there are not enough players to follow the open servers, they will be closed and we are deprived of enjoying the game in which we bought or simply have an emotional link to the game. And we would like to receive your help and take letters on the matter to avoid this situation where these digital goods are taken away from us. Thank you very much for reading us and giving us the option to make us heard.
